declarations.description: Form-associated searchable select web component with single and multiple selection, validation, option filtering, custom selected-value rendering, slots for options and adornments, and mobile-friendly popover behavior.
declarations.name: JBSelectWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial selected value from markup. For non-string values or runtime updates, use the value property.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label text and accessible aria label.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Helper text shown under the select when no validation error is visible.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Enables multiple selection. In multiple mode, value is expected to be an array.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder shown when no value is selected.

attributes.name: search-placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder used by the mobile search input while the select is open.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: External validation error message. When the attribute changes, the component updates its validation UI.

attributes.name: hide-clear
attributes.description: Hides the clear button when set to empty string or true.

attributes.name: disable-auto-validation
attributes.description: Disables automatic validation on user interactions when set to empty string or true.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size variant used by CSS.

members.name: value
members.description: Canonical selected value. In multiple mode this is an array of selected option values.

members.name: textValue
members.description: Current search/filter text shown in the search input.

members.name: selectedOptionTitle
members.description: Visible title for the selected option or comma-separated selected options.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper. Set validation.list for custom validation rules.

members.name: callbacks
members.description: Callback map. Use callbacks.getSelectedValueDOM to customize the selected value display.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the select and closes the option list.

members.name: isDirty
members.description: True when current value differs from initialValue.

members.name: popoverPosition
members.description: How the option popover is positioned.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs validation without showing the error message and returns whether the select is valid.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs validation, shows the first error message, and returns whether the select is valid.

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Focuses the internal search input and opens the option list.

methods.name: blur
methods.description: Closes the option list, clears search text, and validates.

events.name: change
events.description: Cancelable event fired when selected value changes.

events.name: input
events.description: Fired when the user types in the search input.

events.name: keyup
events.description: Keyboard event re-dispatched from the search input. Arrow keys navigate active options; Enter toggles the active option.

events.name: keypress
events.description: Keyboard event re-dispatched from the search input.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Dispatched when checkValidity or reportValidity finds an invalid value.

events.name: init
events.description: Dispatched from connectedCallback after initial setup.

events.name: filter-change
events.description: Internal non-bubbling event used by options to filter themselves from search text.

slots.description: Option content. Use jb-option or jb-option-list children.

slots.name: start-section
slots.description: Content rendered before the selected value/search area.

slots.name: empty-list-message
slots.description: Custom empty-state content shown when no option is visible.

declarations.description: Selectable option web component used inside jb-select. The value can be a string from the attribute or any JavaScript value assigned through the value property.
declarations.name: JBOptionWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Option value from markup. Use the value property for non-string values.

members.name: hidden
members.description: Whether this option is hidden by filtering.

members.name: active
members.description: Whether this option is the active keyboard/hover target.

members.name: optionContentText
members.description: Text content used for default filtering.

methods.name: toggleOption
methods.description: Selects or deselects the option using the same behavior as a click.

events.name: select
events.description: Bubbling event fired when the option is selected.

events.name: deselect
events.description: Bubbling event fired when the option is deselected in multiple mode.

events.name: jb-option-connected
events.description: Internal event fired when the option connects so jb-select can register it.

events.name: jb-option-disconnected
events.description: Internal event fired when the option disconnects so jb-select can unregister it.

cssProperties.name: --jb-option-background-color-active
cssProperties.description: Option background color on hover or keyboard active state.

declarations.description: Helper web component that renders jb-option elements from a JavaScript array and callback functions.
declarations.name: JBOptionListWebComponent

members.name: optionList
members.description: Array of source options used to render jb-option children.

members.name: callbacks
members.description: Callback map used to extract title, value, or content DOM from source options.

methods.name: setCallback
methods.description: Sets one callback by key. Valid keys are getTitle, getValue, and getContentDOM.
